testing_centers.notes: Computer-Based Exams (CBE) at Pearson VUE test centers globally; paper-based exams available in some regions

id_requirements: Valid government-issued photo ID required. Name on ID must match ACCA registration exactly.
exam_rules: Closed-book. Scientific calculators permitted (non-programmable, non-financial). No graphical or financial calculators. No phones or electronic devices. Scratch paper provided.
renewal_options: Passed exams do not expire. Once qualified, ACCA members must complete 40 CPD hours per year (21 verifiable hours minimum). Annual membership subscription required to maintain active ACCA status.

prerequisites.description: Must complete all Applied Skills exams; optional Strategic Professional paper

retake_policy.notes: Maximum 4 attempts per exam in total for Applied Knowledge CBEs (on-demand). Applied Skills and Strategic Professional: 4 exam sessions per year (March, June, September, December). Full exam fee required for each retake.

official_study_resources.title: ACCA Study Resources
official_study_resources.notes: Free past exam papers, examiners' reports, and technical articles
